Sony WH-1000XM5 by Sony.

    Category: Audio.
    Price: 34999.

    Description:
    The Sony WH-1000XM5 are a pair of high-end, wireless, over-ear headphones known for their industry-leading noise cancellation and excellent audio performance. They were launched in 2022 and are the successor to the highly popular WH-1000XM4. 

    Keywords:
    on ear, Audio, Sony WH-1000XM5, Sony

    Product Type:
    on ear

    This is a on ear product suitable for users looking for on ear.

Nothing ear (1) by Nothing.

    Category: Audio.
    Price: 5999.

    Description:
    The Nothing ear (1) are a pair of lightweight, true wireless earbuds known for their transparent design and features like active noise cancellation (ANC), wireless charging, and custom 11.6mm drivers tuned by Teenage Engineering. Released in 2021, they were the debut product from the tech company Nothing, founded by former OnePlus co-founder Carl Pei. 

    Keywords:
    in ear, Audio, Nothing ear (1), Nothing

    Product Type:
    in ear

    This is a in ear product suitable for users looking for in ear.

OnePlus Bullets Z2 by Oneplus.

    Category: Audio.
    Price: 2299.

    Description:
    The OnePlus Bullets Z2 is a popular line of wireless neckband earphones known for long battery life, fast charging, and strong bass. There are two main versions: the standard Bullets Wireless Z2 and the Bullets Wireless Z2 ANC, which adds Active Noise Cancellation.

    Keywords:
    in ear, Audio, OnePlus Bullets Z2, Oneplus

    Product Type:
    in ear

    This is a in ear product suitable for users looking for in ear.

OnePlus Watch 2 by Oneplus.

    Category: Wearables.
    Price: 27999.

    Description:
    The OnePlus Watch 2 is a premium Wear OS smartwatch known for its dual-engine architecture, which delivers an exceptionally long battery life compared to many competitors. It was released in February 2024 and features a durable stainless steel and sapphire crystal build

    Keywords:
    Smart Watch, Wearables, OnePlus Watch 2, Oneplus

    Product Type:
    Smart Watch

    This is a Smart Watch product suitable for users looking for Smart Watch.

Apple Watch Series 10 by Apple.

    Category: Wearables.
    Price: 46900.

    Description:
    The Apple Watch Series 10, released in September 2024, is the successor to the Series 9 and features a thinner design, larger "edge-to-edge" display, and new health sensors. It also includes a faster processor and improved health-tracking capabilities. 

    Keywords:
    Smart Watch, Wearables, Apple Watch Series 10, Apple

    Product Type:
    Smart Watch

    This is a Smart Watch product suitable for users looking for Smart Watch.

Fastrack Limitless FS2+ by Fastrack.

    Category: Wearables.
    Price: 2995.

    Description:
    The Fastrack Limitless FS2+ is a feature-rich, budget-friendly smartwatch known for its large display, Bluetooth calling capabilities, and a range of health and fitness tracking features. It was launched in mid-2024 and is designed to appeal to fitness enthusiasts and those looking for a modern-looking smartwatch with practical functions. 

    Keywords:
    Smart Watch, Wearables, Fastrack Limitless FS2+, Fastrack

    Product Type:
    Smart Watch

    This is a Smart Watch product suitable for users looking for Smart Watch.

MSI Thin 15 by MSI.

    Category: Laptop.
    Price: 89999.

    Description:
    The MSI Thin 15 is a line of budget-friendly gaming laptops that offers decent 1080p performance in a slim and lightweight chassis. There are multiple versions available, with specs varying by model and generation. Recent models feature Intel Core or AMD Ryzen processors and NVIDIA RTX 30 or 40 series graphics.

    Keywords:
    Gaming Laptop, Laptop, MSI Thin 15, MSI

    Product Type:
    Gaming Laptop

    This is a Gaming Laptop product suitable for users looking for Gaming Laptop.

Lenovo LOQ 2024  by Lenovo.

    Category: Laptop.
    Price: 145790.

    Description:
    The Lenovo LOQ 2024 model 83DV00X8IN is a powerful entry-to-mid-range gaming laptop that offers a strong combination of a high-performance 13th Gen Intel processor and an RTX 4060 graphics card. It is a compelling option for gamers and creators seeking solid performance without the premium price of Lenovo's Legion line. 

    Keywords:
    Gaming Laptop, Laptop, Lenovo LOQ 2024 , Lenovo

    Product Type:
    Gaming Laptop

    This is a Gaming Laptop product suitable for users looking for Gaming Laptop.

ASUS Vivobook S16 by Asuse.

    Category: Laptop.
    Price: 86990.

    Description:
    The ASUS Vivobook S16 is not a gaming laptop but is built as a portable AI-driven powerhouse for students and creative professionals. It excels with its premium build, a stunning high-resolution OLED display, and excellent battery life. Its primary focus is on productivity and creative tasks, making it a poor choice for demanding gaming.

    Keywords:
    Student Laptop, Laptop, ASUS Vivobook S16, Asuse

    Product Type:
    Student Laptop
